recommendations.title: The Gravedancers
recommendations.overview: After a night of drunken exploits, Allison, Harris, and Kira are chased and terrorized by the ghosts of a child pyromaniac, an ax murderer, and a rapist.

recommendations.title: The Woman
recommendations.overview: A lawyer puts his family in jeopardy when he captures the last member of a violent clan and tries to forcibly tame her.

recommendations.title: Don't Kill It
recommendations.overview: Demon hunter Jebediah Huntley teams up with an FBI agent to battle a supernatural force in the southern state of Mississippi.

recommendations.title: Dog Soldiers
recommendations.overview: A band of soldiers is dispatched to war games deep in the woods. When they stumble across a rival team slaughtered in camp, they realize they're not alone.

recommendations.title: The Barrens
recommendations.overview: A man takes his family on a camping trip and becomes convinced they are being stalked by the legendary monster of the New Jersey Pine Barrens: the Jersey Devil.

recommendations.title: May
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward veterinary assistant with a lazy eye and obsession with perfection descends into depravity after developing a crush on a boy with perfect hands.

recommendations.title: Bullet Head
recommendations.overview: A group of career criminals finds itself trapped in a warehouse with the law – and an Attack Dog named DeNiro closing in.

recommendations.title: The Woods
recommendations.overview: In 1965 New England, a troubled girl encounters mysterious happenings in the woods surrounding an isolated girls school that she was sent to by her estranged parents.

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Crazed members of a sadistic family return to their childhood home to terrorize the new owners.

recommendations.title: Old Man
recommendations.overview: Deep in the woods, a lost hiker stumbles upon the cabin of an erratic and reclusive old man. What starts off as cordial conversation soon turns dangerous as it becomes clear that one or both of them might be hiding a terrifying secret.
